src_raw: 金管局按個別員工的工作表現，分配獲批准用作調整年度固定薪酬及浮動薪酬的款項；而適用於負責投資的員工的浮動薪酬制度，則旨在加強其投資表現與薪酬的連繫。助理總裁及以上職級員工的固定薪酬調整及浮動薪酬的發放，是由財政司司長經參考管治委員會的意見後批准，有關員工在會議討論到其薪酬的議案時會避席。主管及以下職級員工的固定薪酬調整及浮動薪酬的發放，則由金管局總裁根據財政司司長授權，按照獲批准用作支付薪酬的整筆款項來決定。
mt_raw: The Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) allocates the approved funds for adjusting annual fixed and variable pay based on individual employees' performance. The variable pay system applicable to investment staff is designed to strengthen the link between their investment performance and their compensation. Adjustments to fixed pay and the distribution of variable pay for employees at the level of Deputy Governor and above are approved by the Financial Secretary after consulting the Governance Committee. Such employees are absent from meetings when their pay-related proposals are discussed. For employees at the level of Director and below, adjustments to fixed pay and the distribution of variable pay are determined by the HKMA Governor, under the authority of the Financial Secretary, based on the lump sum approved for salary payments.

src_raw: 金管局亦參與央行與監管機構綠色金融網絡下的多個工作組，包括微觀審慎監管工作組、宏觀金融工作組及促進綠色金融工作組。此外，金管局亦加入了兩個新設的工作組：研究工作組及彌補數據缺口工作組。研究工作組負責相關研究工作，而彌補數據缺口工作組旨在制定監管當局及金融機構評估氣候相關風險與機遇所需、但目前卻並未掌握的數據項目詳盡清單。有關金管局年內在推動綠色及可持續銀行業發展方面的工作，詳見「銀行體系穩定」一章。
mt_raw: The HKMA also participates in multiple working groups under the central bank and regulatory authorities' green finance network, including the Microprudential Supervision Working Group, the Macro-financial Working Group, and the Promoting Green Finance Working Group. In addition, the HKMA has joined two newly established working groups: the Research Working Group and the Data Gap Filling Working Group. The Research Working Group is responsible for conducting relevant research, while the Data Gap Filling Working Group aims to develop a comprehensive list of data items required by regulators and financial institutions to assess climate-related risks and opportunities, which are currently not available. Details regarding the HKMA's work in promoting green and sustainable banking development this year are provided in the chapter titled "Banking System Stability."

src_raw: 金管局在11月與國際金融公司聯合推出綠色商業銀行聯盟，協助各新興市場的銀行制定應對氣候變化的方案。作為聯盟的創始成員及首個區域執行理事，金管局i)在全球金融市場推動發展綠色商業銀行；ii)為商業銀行提供互相學習平台，獲取所需知識、工具及商業資訊，以制定其本身的綠色金融路線圖，並轉型為具公信力的綠色銀行；iii)促進溝通，並探討前沿議題推動全球綠色議程；以及iv)協助聯盟的成員合作，以及把握國際金融公司所識別在未來10年估計高達23萬億美元的新興市場綠色及氣候相關投資機會。
mt_raw: In November, the Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) launched the Green Commercial Banking Alliance with the International Finance Corporation (IFC) to help banks in emerging markets develop strategies to address climate change. As a founding member and the first regional executive director of the alliance, the HKMA i) promotes the development of green commercial banking in global financial markets; ii) provides a platform for commercial banks to learn from each other, gaining the knowledge, tools, and business information needed to develop their own green finance roadmaps and transform into credible green banks; iii) facilitates communication and explores cutting-edge issues to advance the global green agenda; and iv) assists alliance members in collaboration and in accessing the estimated $23 trillion in green and climate-related investment opportunities in emerging markets identified by the IFC over the next decade.

mt_raw: Locally, the Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) collaborates with other financial regulatory bodies to coordinate measures within the financial sector to address climate and environmental risks. src_raw: 外聘投資經理須就其替金管局管理的上市股票組合的ESG表現接受評估。金管局透過溝通計劃，有系統地檢視外聘投資經理在不同範疇的ESG作業手法，例如其ESG評估架構、與獲投資公司的溝通，以及代理投票方面的工作。金管局在2020年選出若干外聘投資經理率先進行溝通計劃，當中不僅評估其ESG表現，亦檢視其有否代表金管局妥善行使資產擁有權。
mt_raw: External investment managers must have their ESG performance assessed for the listed stock portfolios they manage on behalf of the Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA). The HKMA systematically reviews the ESG operational practices of external investment managers through a communication plan, including their ESG evaluation frameworks, communication with investee companies, and proxy voting activities. In 2020, the HKMA selected a number of external investment managers to pilot the communication plan, during which not only their ESG performance was assessed, but also whether they appropriately exercised asset ownership on behalf of the HKMA.

A specifically appointed external consultants to provide advice on ESG procedures, reflecting a commitment to accelerating reforms, and established a new ESG committee composed of senior management, demonstrating commitment to ESG and the support of senior management for these measures.

In particular, B had previously voted in favor of management’s proposals in all cases, deviating from its own proxy voting guidelines. B subsequently pledged to strengthen the company’s voting policy to align with expectations, including increasing the involvement of ESG team members and potentially voting against management when facing significant governance issues.

src_raw: 在私募市場投資方面，金管局藉着其專責合夥人致力與相關投資組合公司在ESG事宜上合作，從而實現負責任投資。金管局留意到專責合夥人都貫徹對ESG的承擔，因他們認為此舉可有利創造投資組合公司的長期價值和確保回報的可持續性。下文列舉的兩個例子顯示可透過(i)設計改動及利用創新運作技術；以及(ii)在建造及營運綠色及可持續倉庫時融入減碳因素，以管理氣候變化風險。兩個例子都對環境產生顯著的正面影響，減少碳排放，避免有害物質，並同時透過降低成本及節省能源，提升運作效率。
mt_raw: In the area of private market investments, the Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) achieves responsible investment through its dedicated partners, who collaborate with relevant portfolio companies on ESG matters. The HKMA has noted that these dedicated partners consistently uphold their commitment to ESG, as they believe this approach can help create long-term value for portfolio companies and ensure the sustainability of returns. The two examples listed below demonstrate how climate change risks can be managed through (i) design modifications and the utilization of innovative operational technologies; and (ii) incorporating carbon reduction factors when constructing and operating green and sustainable warehouses. Both examples have had a significant positive impact on the environment, reducing carbon emissions, avoiding harmful substances, and simultaneously improving operational efficiency through cost reduction and energy conservation.

src_raw: (i) 金管局有投資一間採用環保方案的害蟲防治公司。雖然傳統殺蟲劑及化學製品能有效殺滅害蟲，但若未能迅速清除或妥善棄置蟲屍，將會危害公共衛生。此外，化學成分的滲漏及棄置亦會造成環境問題。該公司採用的不含生物殺滅劑方案，透過設置捕蟲器以減少使用有害化學品。該公司亦利用與互聯網相連的動態感應器，遙距偵察是否已捕獲害蟲。藉着此項新技術，該公司能作出完善的路線規劃以收集捕獲的害蟲，減低出行里程，從而減少碳排放。該公司採用的方案令公司整體碳排的淨效應達到每美元淨銷售額0.36千克二氧化碳當量的低水平，接近法律服務及軟件出版等低碳行業的平均水平，實在令人鼓舞。
mt_raw: The Hong Kong Monetary Authority has invested in a pest control company that employs an environmentally friendly solution. While traditional insecticides and chemical products can effectively eliminate pests, failure to promptly remove or properly dispose of dead pests can pose a threat to public health. Furthermore, leakage and disposal of chemical substances can cause environmental problems. The company’s solution, which does not use biocides, reduces the use of harmful chemicals by installing insect traps. The company also utilizes dynamic sensors connected to the internet to remotely monitor whether pests have been captured. With this new technology, the company can optimize routes for collecting captured pests, reducing travel mileage and thereby decreasing carbon emissions. The company’s solution results in a net carbon emissions level of 0.36 kilograms of carbon dioxide equivalent per dollar of net sales, a low level close to the average for low-carbon industries such as legal services and software publishing, which is truly encouraging.

mt_raw: (ii) The Financial Services and Markets Authority has investments in green and sustainable warehouses. Although the construction industry is a major source of carbon emissions, the related warehouse developers adopt net-zero carbon emission procedures in their overall warehouse construction and operation, and establish standards and indicators to measure net-zero carbon emission performance. The building plans also consider the sustainability of the materials and components used. Therefore, the constructed warehouses have high carbon reduction efficiency and possess sustainable features, including solar heating systems, electric vehicle charging facilities, natural lighting, and rainwater harvesting.

src_raw: 我的目標是就整體財務報表是否不存有任何因欺詐或錯誤而導致的重大錯誤陳述取得合理保證，並發出包括我意見的審計師報告。合理保證是高水平的保證，但不能確保按審計署審計準則進行的審計定能發現所存有的任何重大錯誤陳述。錯誤陳述可以由欺詐或錯誤引起，如果合理預期它們個別或滙總起來可能影響財務報表使用者所作出的經濟決定，則會被視作重大錯誤陳述。
mt_raw: My objective is to obtain reasonable assurance that the financial statements as a whole do not contain any material misstatements resulting from fraud or error, and to issue an auditor's report that includes my opinion. Reasonable assurance is a high level of assurance, but it does not guarantee that an audit conducted in accordance with the audit standards of the audit office will necessarily detect any material misstatements that may exist. A misstatement may be caused by fraud or error, and it is considered material if it is reasonably expected that it, individually or in aggregate, could influence the economic decisions made by users of the financial statements.

src_raw:
在根據審計署審計準則進行審計的過程中，我會運用專業判斷並秉持專業懷疑態度。我亦會：
- 識別和評估因欺詐或錯誤而導致財務報表存有重大錯誤陳述的風險；設計及執行審計程序以應對這些風險；以及取得充足和適當的審計憑證，作為我意見的基礎。由於欺詐可能涉及串謀、偽造、蓄意遺漏、虛假陳述，或凌駕內部控制的情況，因此未能發現因欺詐而導致重大錯誤陳述的風險，較未能發現因錯誤而導致者為高；
- 了解與審計相關的內部控制，以設計適當的審計程序。然而，此舉並非旨在對集團內部控制的有效性發表意見；
- 評價金融管理專員所採用的會計政策是否恰當，以及其作出的會計估計和相關資料披露是否合理；

src_raw: 基金的資產分作四個不同的組合來管理：支持組合、投資組合、長期增長組合及策略性資產組合。根據香港的貨幣發行局制度，支持組合的資產與貨幣基礎完全相配。投資組合主要投資於經濟合作與發展組織成員國的債券及股票市場。長期增長組合持有私募股權及房地產投資。策略性資產組合持有香港特別行政區（香港特區）政府為策略目的而購入，並列入基金的帳目內的香港交易及結算所有限公司的股票。經營分部資料載於附註32。
mt_raw: The fund’s assets are managed through four distinct portfolios: the Support Portfolio, the Investment Portfolio, the Long-Term Growth Portfolio, and the Strategic Asset Portfolio. In accordance with the Hong Kong Monetary Authority’s system, the assets of the Support Portfolio are fully matched with the monetary base. The Investment Portfolio primarily invests in the debt and equity markets of member countries of the Organisation for Economic Co-operation and Development. The Long-Term Growth Portfolio holds private equity and real estate investments. The Strategic Asset Portfolio holds shares of Hong Kong Exchanges and Clearing Limited purchased by the Government of the Hong Kong Special Administrative Region (HKSAR) for strategic purposes and recorded in the fund’s accounts. Segmental information is set out in note 32.

src_raw: 編製符合香港財務報告準則的財務報表需要管理層作出判斷、估計及假設，而有關判斷、估計及假設會影響會計政策的採納及資產、負債、收入及支出的呈報數額。此等估計及相關的假設是根據以往經驗及其他在有關情況下認為合適的因素而制定。在欠缺其他現成數據的情況下，則採用此等估計及假設作為判斷有關資產及負債的帳面值的基準，估計結果與實際價值或有不同。
mt_raw: Preparing financial statements in accordance with Hong Kong Financial Reporting Standards requires management to make judgments, estimates, and assumptions, which affect the adoption of accounting policies and the amounts reported for assets, liabilities, income, and expenses. These estimates and related assumptions are based on past experience and other factors considered appropriate in the circumstances. In the absence of other data, these estimates and assumptions serve as the basis for determining the carrying amounts of assets and liabilities, and the estimated results may differ from actual values.
